---
name: Feature Request
about: Propose a new feature or improvement for ShrimPK
title: "[Feature] "
labels: enhancement
assignees: ""
---

## Problem / Motivation

What problem does this solve, or what use case does it enable? Be specific.

## Proposed Solution

Describe your proposed approach. If you have thoughts on the API or interface, sketch them out here.

## Alternatives Considered

What other approaches did you consider, and why do you prefer this one?

## Additional Context

Any benchmarks, related issues, prior art, or references that would help evaluate this proposal.
